template_description: Professional English resume template optimized for senior roles and executive positions with emphasis on leadership and strategic impact

contact.notes: Executive contact format. Professional email required. Include LinkedIn and any relevant professional profiles.

executive_summary.title: Executive Summary
executive_summary.guidelines: 3-4 sentences. Lead with title/role identity. Include scope of impact (team size, budget, revenue). Mention 2-3 signature achievements with metrics.
executive_summary.example: Senior Engineering Executive with 15+ years leading high-performance teams of 50+ engineers across 3 continents. Delivered $50M+ in revenue impact through platform modernization and operational efficiency initiatives. Track record of scaling organizations from Series A to IPO while maintaining 95%+ retention of top talent.

core_competencies.title: Core Competencies
core_competencies.notes: Use 2-column grid for space efficiency. Focus on executive-level competencies.

professional_experience.title: Professional Experience

entries.guidelines: Start with role scope (team size, budget, revenue responsibility). Then 3-5 achievement bullets. Lead with business impact ($, %, scale).
entries.example_bullet: Transformed engineering organization from waterfall to agile, increasing delivery velocity by 3x and reducing production incidents by 60% across 12 teams

professional_experience.notes: Last 10-15 years only. Earlier career summarized in 'Earlier Career' section if needed.

entries.notes: Brief. Focus on highest degree and any executive education.

board_advisory.title: Board & Advisory Roles

entries.notes: Include current and past board/advisory positions.

board_advisory.notes: Optional. Include if you have board or advisory experience.

speaking_publications.title: Speaking & Publications
speaking_publications.notes: Optional. Include notable speaking engagements, publications, or patents.

certifications.title: Certifications & Awards
certifications.notes: Optional. Brief list of most prestigious items.

font.name: Times New Roman
font.notes: Traditional serif font conveys professionalism and gravitas. Widely accepted in conservative industries.

layout.notes: Clean, authoritative single-column layout. Generous margins for readability. Subtle section dividers.

color_scheme.notes: Conservative color palette. Black text with subtle navy accent. Professional and understated.

dont: Include full career history (focus on last 10-15 years)
Use excessive formatting or design elements

example_resume.executive_summary: Senior Engineering Executive with 18+ years leading global technology organizations. Scaled engineering teams from 10 to 200+ across US, Europe, and Asia. Delivered $80M+ in combined revenue impact through digital transformation, platform modernization, and operational efficiency. Proven track record of building high-performing cultures with 92%+ retention of top talent over 5+ years.

professional_experience.title: Vice President of Engineering
professional_experience.scope: Led global engineering organization of 200+ FTEs and contractors across 5 offices. $25M annual budget responsibility.
bullet_points: Drove $40M revenue increase by leading cloud-native platform rebuild, reducing time-to-market from quarters to weeks
Restructured engineering organization into autonomous product teams, improving delivery velocity by 3x and employee satisfaction scores by 35%
Reduced infrastructure costs by 45% ($8M/year) through cloud optimization and strategic vendor renegotiation
Established engineering excellence program reducing production incidents by 70% and improving system availability to 99.99%
Led acquisition technical integration of 3 companies ($200M+ combined), completing all within 6 months of close

professional_experience.title: Senior Director of Engineering
professional_experience.scope: Managed 80+ person engineering team across platform, infrastructure, and developer experience. $12M budget.
bullet_points: Scaled engineering team from 30 to 80+ while maintaining 95% annual retention through structured career frameworks
Delivered $25M revenue platform supporting company growth from $50M to $200M ARR
Championed DevOps transformation, reducing deployment cycle from monthly to continuous delivery (200+ deploys/week)

board_advisory.description: Mentor early-stage B2B SaaS startups on technical strategy, team building, and go-to-market.
